subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto the call of thy Lord, then act in accordance with that which thou art bidden from the presence of One All-Knowing, All-Informed, that thou mayest follow the command of thy Lord as revealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسمع ندآء ربک ثم اعمل بما تومر من لدن علیم خبیرا لتکون متبعا امر ربک بما نزل
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @thankfulness; gratitude, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @proofs of the Manifestations of God
